Describe the sequence of actions performed by the host and the subsequent title displays during the introduction.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a person wearing a dark blue t-shirt rubs their hands together; at 4s, the man points both index fingers towards the camera; at 6s, he looks down at the black digital watch on his wrist; at 12s, the Bondi Harvest logo appears on a black screen; at 18s, white text reading CHIMICHURRI displays over the ingredients.

What happens to the herb mixture after it is collected in the yellow bowl?
canonical_answer: The mixture is poured from the yellow bowl into a clear glass jar.
